== Notes for [[Item:Q105476|Q105476]] ==

* [https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Matthew+1&version=KJV Matthew 1:15]

Wikipedia: [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Matthew_1:15 1:15]

Mat 1:15

Or Luke 3:24 Matthat Rin 7956

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000001984210027

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]][[Category:Pages]]
